name: producer-player
description: Producer Player desktop app for producers managing album tracks, exports, and ordering.
author: EthanSK

scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n RENDERER,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:hot: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n RENDERER,ELECTRON -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:renderer:hot" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @producer-player/contracts && npm run build -w @producer-player/domain
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @producer-player/renderer && npm run build -w @producer-player/electron
scripts.typecheck:app: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/domain && npm run typecheck -w apps/renderer && npm run typecheck -w apps/electron
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:app && npm run typecheck -w apps/e2e
scripts.e2e: npm run build && npm run ci:smoke -w @producer-player/e2e
scripts.e2e:smoke: npm run build && npm run ci:smoke -w @producer-player/e2e
scripts.e2e:core: npm run build && npm run ci:core -w @producer-player/e2e
scripts.e2e:full: npm run build && npm run ci -w @producer-player/e2e
scripts.e2e:ci: npm run build && npm run ci -w @producer-player/e2e
scripts.validate:quick: npm run typecheck:app && npm run e2e:smoke
scripts.validate:core: npm run typecheck:app && npm run e2e:core
scripts.validate:full: npm run typecheck && npm run e2e:full
scripts.version:bump:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:sync
scripts.version:bump:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run version:sync
scripts.release:desktop:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux zip --publish never
scripts.release:desktop:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win zip --publish never
